urdu transliteration text:
Wawayla hai wawaylasab milke kare ab ahle azaWawayla hai wawayla
Wawayla oh wawayla [wailing]All together the mourners sayWawayla oh wawayla [wailing]

Islam nabi ka bachaya hai,taqdeer ka deep jalaya haiQuran ka maan barhayatawheed pe ghar ko lutaya haiShabir ka matam, wawaylaDilgeer ka matam, wawaylaYeh ehle aza ka hai noha
Wawayla hai wawayla
Wawayla oh wawayla [wailing]
english translation text: He saved the Islam of prophetHe lit the lantern of fateHe furthered the respect of QuranFor unity of Allah he sacrificed his householdShabbir's matam, wawayla [wailing]The matam of the mournful, wawayla [wailing]This is the lamentation of the mourners

urdu transliteration text:
Hum shakl e payambar mara gaya Che maah ka asgher maaragayaAbbas e dilawar mara gayaShabir ka dilbar mara gayaAkbar ka matam, wawaylaAsgher ka matam, wawaylaZainab ke labon per thi ye sada
Wawayla hai wawayla
Wawayla oh wawayla [wailing]
english translation text: The image of the Prophet is killedSix month old Asgher is killedAbbas the valiant is killedShabbir's beloved is killedAkber's matam, wawayla [wailing]Asgher's matam, wawayla [wailing]On the lips of Zainab were these words

urdu transliteration text:
Kaise ho raqam ehwaal e jafaadaa ne sitam kuch aisa kiyaQasim ka ja ad pamal huwa,behaal huwi umme farwaQasim ka matam, wawaylaBekas ka matam, wawaylaQasim ka gham hai aur kubra
Wawayla hai wawayla
Wawayla oh wawayla [wailing]
english translation text: How can one write the atrocitiesThat the enemies carried out in this wayQasim's body was trampledDistraught was Umme FarwaQasim's matam, wawayla [wailing]The matam of the lonely, wawayla [wailing]The mourning of Qasim and Kubra

urdu transliteration text:
Kya ghurbat thi tanhaai thii jabshame gharibaan aayi thiIk zulm ki badli chaai thipaighaame aseeri laayi thiGhurbat ka matam, wawaylaItrat ka matam, wawaylaSab ehle haram ki cheeni rida
Wawayla hai wawayla
Wawayla oh wawayla [wailing]
english translation text: What desolation and loneliness was thereWhen Shaame Gharibaan cameThe cloud of oppression was overheadAnd heralded in the message of captivityThe matam of the desolate, wawayla [wailing]The matam of the family, wawayla [wailing]The veils of the women was snatched

urdu transliteration text:
Paband e salasil ehle haramkhaamosh uthaaye bare sitamHai mehve safar larzida qadam,seeno me liye shabir ka ghamMazloom ka matam, wawaylaMasoom ka matam, wawaylaKarta hai falaq unpar girya
Wawayla hai wawayla
Wawayla oh wawayla [wailing]
english translation text: The family of the Prophet was chained in ropesQuietly they bore the weight of the tyrannyOn this journey with quivering feetIn their hearts was the sadness of ShabbirThe matam of the oppressed, wawayla [wailing]The matam of the pure, wawayla [wailing]The skies are shedding tears for them

urdu transliteration text:
Bichta hai jahaan per farshe azahota jahaan par gham barpaPursa ko pohonchti hai Zahrakarti huwi saarim ye nohaSarwar ka matam, wawaylaGhar ghar ka matam, wawaylaPyaaro per karti hai roz buka
Wawayla hai wawayla
Wawayla oh wawayla [wailing]
english translation text: Where ever the mourners gather in remembranceWhere ever the sadness is expressedZahra comes there for condolencesAnd wailing in lamentation herselfThe matam of the leader, wawayla [wailing]The matam of the house, wawayla [wailing]She cries for  her beloved every day
